rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It performed a read-only audit of the Ray cluster, gathering data on worker replicas (3, up from baseline 2), image versions (rayproject/ray:2.9.0 on both deployments), resource requests/limits (empty on both), services (ray-head exposing ports 6379 and 8265), and active ConfigMaps (kube-root-ca.crt, change-plan, ray-job-script). It documented all findings in a structured 152-line report and saved it as the required `config-audit` ConfigMap under the `findings.txt` key. The only mutation recorded was creating this ConfigMap — the live cluster was otherwise untouched. The oracle confirmed a pass verdict, and the regression sweep shows all 7 pipeline stages still passing.
